---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to Rout
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem
What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the behavior you want.

## Example UX
Show concrete examples of commands/messages and expected replies.

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you evaluated.

## Scope
Check any that apply:
- [ ] Core watcher/runtime
- [ ] Command handler
- [ ] Docs/onboarding
- [ ] Testing/reliability

## Additional Context
Links, screenshots, prior art, or related issues.
